# Load the quranic_verses.json file to search for the ayah
import json, os, re, unicodedata
qfile = "/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json"
with open(qfile, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    q = json.load(f)
len(q)

# show first few entries keys
q[0]

full_span = "إِنَّ الْمُسْلِمِينَ وَالْمُسْلِمَاتِ وَالْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ وَالْقَانِتِينَ وَالْقَانِتَاتِ وَالصَّادِقِينَ وَالصَّادِقَاتِ وَالصَّابِرِينَ وَالصَّابِرَاتِ وَالْخَاشِعِينَ وَالْخَاشِعَاتِ وَالْمُتَصَدِّقِينَ وَالْمُتَصَدِّقَاتِ وَالصَّائِمِينَ وَالصَّائِمَاتِ وَالْحَافِظِينَ فُرُوجَهُمْ وَالْحَافِظَاتِ وَالذَّاكِرِينَ اللَّهَ كَثِيرًا وَالذَّاكِرَاتِ"
candidate, full_span == candidate

import re
# normalization function: remove tashkeel, tatweel, punctuation, unify hamza variants etc.
tashkeel_regex = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]')  # covers many marks
tatweel = '\u0640'
def normalize_ar(text):
    # Unicode normalize
    text = unicodedata.normalize('NFKC', text)
    # remove tashkeel and other diacritics
    text = tashkeel_regex.sub('', text)
    # remove tatweel
    text = text.replace(tatweel, '')
    # replace different hamzas with bare hamza? unify 'أ' 'إ' 'آ' 'ا' => use 'ا' for base?
    # But we should maybe map all to 'ا' to simplify
    text = re.sub('[إأآا]', 'ا', text)
    # replace 'ى' with 'ي'
    text = text.replace('ى', 'ي')
    # remove punctuation
    text = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', text)
    # collapse whitespace
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    # lowercase not applicable
    return text

cand_norm = normalize_ar(candidate)
full_norm = normalize_ar(full_span)
cand_norm, full_norm, cand_norm==full_norm

def token_f1(a, b):
    a_tokens = a.split()
    b_tokens = b.split()
    set_a = a_tokens
    set_b = b_tokens
    # compute overlap by multiset? Use token counts
    from collections import Counter
    ca = Counter(a_tokens)
    cb = Counter(b_tokens)
    overlap = sum((ca & cb).values())
    if overlap==0:
        return 0.0, 0.0, 0.0
    precision = overlap / len(a_tokens)
    recall = overlap / len(b_tokens)
    if precision+recall==0:
        f1=0.0
    else:
        f1 = 2*precision*recall/(precision+recall)
    return precision, recall, f1

prec, rec, f1 = token_f1(cand_norm, full_norm)
prec, rec, f1
